word: H5556 - סׇלְעָם - çolʻâm - sol-awm' - Bald locust

sections.paragraph:
Original: סלעם

Transliteration: sol‛âm

Phonetic: sol-awm'

BDB Definition:

  1. locust
    1. an edible winged locust

Origin: apparently from the same as H5553 in the sense of crushing as with a rock, i.e. consuming

TWOT entry: 1509

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
